title: Debug Kubernetes Pod Crash Loop
description: Diagnose and fix pods stuck in CrashLoopBackOff state.
steps: Get pod status: kubectl describe pod {pod} -n {namespace}
Check events section at bottom of describe output for clues
Common causes: missing env vars, failed DB connection, port conflict, OOM
For OOM: check resource limits vs actual usage, increase memory limit
For config issues: verify ConfigMap/Secret values are correct
For dependency issues: check if required services are running
After fix: delete pod to force restart with corrected config
